top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races rs ON r.raceId = rs.raceId
WHERE rs.year = 2008 
  AND rs.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' 
  AND r.position IS NOT NULL 
  AND r.statusId NOT IN (SELECT statusId FROM status WHERE status = 'Retired');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' 
  AND ra.year = 2008 
  AND r.position IS NOT NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races rs ON r.raceId = rs.raceId
WHERE rs.year = 2008 
  AND rs.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' 
  AND r.position IS NOT NULL 
  AND r.statusId NOT IN (SELECT statusId FROM status WHERE status = 'Retired');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' 
  AND ra.year = 2008 
  AND r.position IS NOT NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 
  AND ra.name LIKE '%Chinese Grand Prix%'
  AND r.statusId != 1;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races rs ON r.raceId = rs.raceId
WHERE rs.year = 2008 
  AND rs.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' 
  AND r.position IS NOT NULL 
  AND r.statusId NOT IN (SELECT statusId FROM status WHERE status = 'Retired');
